title: amphilophis radicans
intro: Amphilophis radicans, also known as climbing snake vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Amphilophis radicans include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using the roots to create a decoction.
